problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
hypothesis: Combining Casimir effect between nanoscale surfaces with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
